sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71160" key="nuktere/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτερέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n71160.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who rows</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fishes by night,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.11</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
